chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1357 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 27-03-2025 Mr. Ihsan Ali Lund, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w Muhammad Zaman, Circle Officer, ACE. Naushahro Feroze and Aftab Mallah, Town Officer, T.C, Mehrabpur. **** Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that petitioner will file fresh petition for seeking his appointment. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
